ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Mar-14-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Donald Field for petitioner Shanaz Farahi.

The court inquired as to the manner in which statutory fees for the portion of the estate in excess of $35,000,000 were calculated. He also noted that the $15,000 paid to the bookkeeper may need to be deducted from the trustee's fee. Mr. Field acknowledged that he had found no authority prescribing the manner of computation of statutory fees for the portion of an estate in excess of $25,000,000.00, so he requested a figure half of the lower rate as a reasonable amount. He stated that it was a complicated estate with many properties, but acknowledged there were professionals handling the management of the properties and that it was not really necessary to have a separate bookkeeper. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge: Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy Jaime. (Not reported)
